reason: Agent successfully retrieved GitHub username using the GitHub tool after granting account access
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded with Super Agent application showing sidebar with agent list
Found "QA-20260319-185931-fqde" agent in sidebar and clicked it - Agent detail page opened showing landing page
Verified agent status - Status displayed as "idle" (blue indicator), meeting the requirement
Clicked message input field - Input field became active and ready for typing
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message entered in input field
Clicked send button - Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", new session "GitHub Username Verification Check" created
Waited 3 seconds for response - Agent transitioned to "awaiting input" status and GitHub account request card appeared
Clicked GitHub checkbox on request card - Checkbox selected, "Grant Access (1)" button became enabled
Clicked "Grant Access" button - Access granted, agent status changed back to "working"
Waited 10 seconds for agent to process and fetch GitHub profile - Agent completed processing and returned response
Verified response includes GitHub username - Response clearly states "Your GitHub username is yiw190" with additional profile details
Took final screenshot - Screenshot captured showing complete conversation flow and response
